name: 05-09-home-light-complete-section-boundaries
title: Home light complete page section boundaries
description: Finish decomposing the approved 1:1 light homepage into first-class frontend page sections so the entire page has real component boundaries and owned hotspot overlays.
scope: homepage light complete page section decomposition
creator: lijin
notes: The light homepage now exposes nav plus six body page sections as real section boundaries: hero, featured-regions, ai-roles, memory-echoes, recommended-coordinates, and cta-footer. Body hotspots moved from one full-artboard overlay into section-owned overlays with section-local coordinate conversion. Static tests, typecheck, build, diff check, and Playwright desktop/mobile self-acceptance passed.

meta.body_hotspot_model: section-owned overlays converted from full-artboard percentages to section-local percentages
meta.visual_qa: Playwright self-acceptance passed on 2026-05-09; report and screenshots saved under .trellis/tasks/05-09-05-09-home-light-complete-section-boundaries/artifacts/playwright/
